name: Lipocine Inc.
business: Lipocine is a biopharmaceutical company focused on leveraging its proprietary technology platform to develop innovative products with effective oral delivery of previously difficult to deliver molecules. The company has a portfolio of differentiated product candidates targeting high unmet needs in neurological and psychiatric CNS disorders, liver disease, and hormone supplementation. Its only approved product is TLANDO for testosterone replacement therapy, which is out-licensed to partners for commercialization.
sellsTo: women at risk of preterm birth

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on leveraging our proprietary technology platform to develop innovative products with effective oral delivery of previously difficult to deliver molecules.

catalysts.event: Report data from Phase 3 trial for LPCN 1154 in postpartum depression
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report data from this Phase 3 trial in April 2026, and data from this trial are expected to support a 505(b)(2) NDA submission for LPCN 1154 in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 600,000 women are affected by PPD annually with approximately 240,000 women diagnosed with PPD, and approximately 144,000 of those diagnosed patients treated with prescription medication.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 600,000 women are affected by PPD annually with approximately 240,000 women diagnosed with PPD, and approximately 144,000 of those diagnosed patients treated with prescription medication.

tamClaims.claim: MDD affects approximately 21 million adults in the U.S., representing 8.4% of the population.
tamClaims.sentence: MDD affects approximately 21 million adults in the U.S., representing 8.4% of the population.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 74% of U.S. adults aged 20 and older are either obese or overweight, and an estimated 30% of the U.S. adult population has a BMI ≥ 30 kg/m².
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 74% of U.S. adults aged 20 and older are either obese or overweight, and an estimated 30% of the U.S. adult population has a BMI 30 kg/m².

tamClaims.claim: Cirrhosis annually has caused more than 1 million deaths, and there are over 500,000 people living with decompensated cirrhosis in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Annually, cirrhosis has caused more than 1 million deaths, and there are over 500,000 people living with decompensated cirrhosis in the U.S.
